message:
feat: add runtime observability, shadow ablation, operator safety, and policy enforcement

Runtime Observability (runtime_observability.rs +693):
- Structured event emission with trace-id correlation
- Performance counter aggregation and anomaly detection
- Integration with flamegraph pipeline for live profiling

Shadow Ablation Engine (shadow_ablation_engine.rs +793):
- Ablation testing framework for isolating performance contributions
- Component-level shadow execution with differential measurement
- Automated regression detection and evidence collection

Operator Safety Copilot (operator_safety_copilot.rs +1040):
- Policy-driven safety envelope enforcement for operator actions
- Risk classification with autonomous mitigation decisions
- Audit trail generation for compliance reporting

Replacement Lineage Log (replacement_lineage_log.rs +535):
- Append-only lineage tracking for component replacements
- Provenance chain validation with cryptographic binding
- Cross-version compatibility assertion framework

Version Matrix Lane (version_matrix_lane.rs +537):
- Multi-version compatibility testing orchestration
- Shared-boundary change detection and exemption handling
- Governance audit ledger for version promotion decisions

Also updates: extension_host_lifecycle, extension_lifecycle_manager,
safe_mode_fallback, receipt_verifier_pipeline, benchmark_denominator,
tee_attestation_policy, adversarial_campaign, compiler_policy,
feature_parity_tracker, frankentui_adapter, flamegraph_pipeline,
release_checklist_gate — all with concurrent agent refinements.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
